title: Produce an evidence-backed Anomaly signal
description: Deferred until private evidence establishes a named historical or plan-relative baseline and versioned deviation rule with acceptable false-positive behavior. Goal trace: G3.
rationale: Calling spend anomalous without a validated baseline and threshold is persuasive narrative, not evidence.
story_want: see deviations only against a validated explicit baseline
story_so_that: ordinary variation is not mislabeled as an exception
acceptance_criteria: Given a released Anomaly policy and evidence satisfying its baseline and coverage rules, when Anomaly is evaluated, then observed value, baseline, deviation, threshold, policy version, evidence horizon, and limitations are returned.
Given no comparable baseline or an unmet evidence rule, when Anomaly is requested, then Incomparable Baseline or Insufficient Evidence is returned and no anomaly severity is emitted.
Given identical evidence and policy versions, when Anomaly is repeated, then semantically identical threshold outcome and ordering are returned.
